temporal_description: In a dimly lit nighttime scene, two men stand on what appears to be a balcony or rooftop. The man on the left, wearing a light-colored, short-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers, is actively talking on a mobile phone held to his ear. The man on the right, dressed in a dark suit, stands listening to him. In the background, the out-of-focus lights of a city at night are visible, along with the dark silhouette of a building. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains stationary, capturing the interaction between the two men. A man speaks in a slightly rushed and matter-of-fact tone, as if he's in a hurry. He says, "我没时间回去吃饭了" (I don't have time to go back for dinner). His voice is clear and direct, conveying a sense of finality about his plans. The background is quiet, with only the faint, ambient sounds of a city at night, suggesting the scene takes place outdoors. The scene cuts to a close-up shot from the back seat of a car. The man in the suit is now in the passenger seat, still on his phone. The interior of the car is dark, with the city lights visible through the windows in the blurred background. The camera is steady, focusing on the man's profile as he continues his phone conversation. The "风行网" watermark remains in the same position on the screen.
